summary: Draggable dashboard cards feature tested successfully. All core functionality working: edit mode toggle, drag handles, card reordering, save/reset/close buttons, localStorage persistence, and VIP banner lock.

issues: Minor: IDBDatabase error in console (NotFoundError for object stores) - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: DraggableDashboard.jsx uses @dnd-kit/core library correctly with proper sensors and activation constraints
VIP banner correctly locked using lockedCards prop - shows gray lock icon instead of purple drag handle
localStorage persistence implemented correctly with key 'dashboard_card_order'
Edit mode panel has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draggable dashboard feature fully tested. Edit mode activated via gear button (data-testid='edit-dashboard-btn'). Cards can be reordered by dragging purple handles. VIP banner is locked (gray lock icon). Layout saved to localStorage with key 'dashboard_card_order'. Set localStorage 'tutorial_completed' to 'true' and 'profile_popup_skipped' to current timestamp before testing to skip popups.

Edit_Mode_Button_Tests.gear_icon_visible: PASSED - Edit button (gear icon) visible in bottom right corner with data-testid='edit-dashboard-btn'
Edit_Mode_Button_Tests.click_enters_edit_mode: PASSED - Clicking gear button shows edit mode control panel

Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.panel_visible: PASSED - Edit mode panel appears with data-testid='edit-mode-panel'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.instruction_banner: PASSED - Purple banner shows 'Cards drag करा आणि reorder करा'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.save_button: PASSED - 'Layout Save करा' button with data-testid='save-layout-btn'
Edit_Mode_Panel_Tests.close_button: PASSED - X button closes edit mode without saving

Drag_Handle_Tests.handles_visible: PASSED - 10 purple drag handles visible (one per draggable card)
Drag_Handle_Tests.handles_functional: PASSED - Cards can be dragged using handles

Card_Reordering_Tests.drag_reorder: PASSED - Cards successfully reorder when dragged
Card_Reordering_Tests.save_button_activation: PASSED - Save button becomes enabled after reordering

Save_Layout_Tests.save_persists: PASSED - Layout saved to localStorage with key 'dashboard_card_order'
Save_Layout_Tests.toast_notification: PASSED - Shows 'Layout Save करा ✓' toast on save
Save_Layout_Tests.edit_mode_closes: PASSED - Edit mode panel closes after save

Reset_Layout_Tests.reset_button_works: PASSED - Reset button restores default card order
Reset_Layout_Tests.changes_cleared: PASSED - hasChanges state reset after clicking reset

Close_Button_Tests.close_cancels: PASSED - X button closes edit mode without saving changes
Close_Button_Tests.changes_discarded: PASSED - Unsaved changes discarded on close

VIP_Banner_Lock_Tests.lock_icon_visible: PASSED - VIP banner shows gray lock icon instead of purple drag handle
VIP_Banner_Lock_Tests.cannot_drag: PASSED - VIP banner card has cursor-not-allowed and cannot be dragged

LocalStorage_Persistence_Tests.order_saved: PASSED - Card order saved as JSON array to localStorage
LocalStorage_Persistence_Tests.persists_reload: PASSED - Order persists across page reloads
LocalStorage_Persistence_Tests.default_order: PASSED - Default order: stats-cards, smart-insights, quick-actions, recent-activity, security-trust, user-controls, statement-export, activity-feed, vip-banner

console_warnings: IDBDatabase NotFoundError - Object stores not found (doesn't affect functionality)
React state update warning on unmounted component (cosmetic)
